stemHtml: In the "worst case" scenario of recovery from the effects of a microburst, having increased to full go-around power, in co-ordinating power and pitch it may be necessary to…

options.a: reduce speed to V<sub>2</sub> and hold
options.b: increase the pitch angle until the stick shaker is felt and hold at slightly below this angle
options.c: slowly increase speed whilst maintaining a positive rate of climb
